automationEvents.rationale: This post is a general product update and does not mention limits, caps, or usage becoming available again.
automationEvents.tweetText:
Today, the OpenAI product and engineering team is humming, there is so much to coordinate and keep running across the release of GPT 5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna, ChatGPT Work, the new ChatGPT desktop app, hosted sites and a million other things... together with the new ChatGPT Voice just launched yesterday.

We will not get it all right, give us feedback and we will iterate quickly. Thank you for being an amazing community.

automationEvents.tweetText:
ChatGPT Work is now rolled out to 100% of our Pro users. Open the ChatGPT mobile app on a phone near you and enjoy productivity on the go. Or install the new ChatGPT desktop app if you need full access to your apps, browser and local files.

One advice: Raise your ambition. GPT 5.6 Sol is different from what you might have seen before. 👀
